overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt riding a horse through a rainy forest trail at dusk. A large snow-capped mountain dominates the background initially before the character turns deeper into the dense woods, with rain falling consistently throughout the atmospheric journey.

agents.ego_description: riding horse at steady canter along the forest trail toward the distant snow-capped mountain

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing motionless near the trees beside the path

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak dominating the background horizon
dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the forest
rustic wooden fence posts running alongside the right edge of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view following a white-haired character riding a brown horse along a dirt trail through a dense forest. A massive snow-capped mountain looms ahead in the distance, visible through gaps in the coniferous trees. Rain falls steadily in the dim dusk light. A distant figure stands motionless near the trees on the right side of the path around the 5-second mark.

events.description: character steers horse to the left along the winding forest trail
snow-capped mountain exits view behind dense tree cover on the left

agents.ego_description: turning left on the forest trail and continuing deeper into the denser woodland

entered.detail: large boulders and rock outcrops visible on the left side of the trail
tall leafless tree with twisted branches standing prominently beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns left along the winding trail, causing the mountain vista to disappear behind the thickening forest canopy. The environment becomes more enclosed as the path curves through denser vegetation. Large rock formations appear on the left while a distinctive bare deciduous tree comes into view beside the trail. The wooden fence from the previous section fades from view as the horse continues deeper into the woods.

agents.ego_description: riding steadily through the narrow forest trail surrounded by dense coniferous trees

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunk lying beside the right edge of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the deeply enclosed forest trail with no mountain visible. The path winds through dense coniferous trees with thick undergrowth on both sides. The character maintains a steady riding pace through the dim, rainy atmosphere. A fallen log appears on the right side of the path as the journey continues deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy forest trail that shifts from an open vista of a distant mountain to a deeply enclosed wilderness. It begins with a third-person view of a white-haired character riding a brown horse along a dirt path, where a massive snow-capped peak looms through gaps in the coniferous trees under a dim, rainy dusk. As the character turns left along the winding trail, the mountain vista disappears behind a thickening canopy and the environment becomes more enclosed, passing large rock formations and a distinctive bare deciduous tree. The scene then shifts further into the dense woods, where the path curves through thick undergrowth and coniferous trees. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace through the rainy atmosphere, passing a fallen log as the journey continues deeper into the secluded forest.
